mapper.sql: SELECT d.device_id, d.park_id, d.building_id, d.floor_no, d.room_id, d.device_name, d.device_code, d.device_type, d.brand, d.device_model, d.payment_type, d.meter_type, d.purpose, d.current_reading, d.current_balance, d.multiplier, d.max_reading, d.warning_unit, d.warning_rules, d.install_location, d.online_status, d.enabled_status, d.last_online_time, d.remark, d.del_flag, d.create_by, d.create_time, d.update_by, d.update_time, p.name AS park_name, b.name AS building_name, r.name AS room_name FROM biz_smart_device d LEFT JOIN ics_park p ON p.id = d.park_id LEFT JOIN ics_building b ON b.id = d.building_id LEFT JOIN ics_room r ON r.id = d.room_id
mapper.select: ORDER BY d.create_time DESC, d.device_id DESC

SELECT COUNT(1) AS totalCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN d.enabled_status = '0' AND d.online_status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS onlineCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN d.enabled_status = '0' AND d.online_status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS offlineCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN d.enabled_status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS disabledCount FROM biz_smart_device d

SELECT d.device_type AS deviceType, COUNT(1) AS total, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN d.online_status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS online, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN d.online_status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS offline FROM biz_smart_device d WHERE d.del_flag = '0' AND d.enabled_status = '0' GROUP BY d.device_type
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_smart_device WHERE device_code = #{deviceCode} AND del_flag = '0' AND device_id != #{excludeId}
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_smart_device SET device_code = CONCAT(LEFT(device_code, 70), '_deleted_', device_id), del_flag = '1', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE device_id IN #{id}
